metadata.description: ByCrawl Agent Skills for social media data extraction across 12 platforms

plugins.name: bycrawl-social-scraper
plugins.description: Universal social media data extraction across 12 platforms using ByCrawl MCP. Scrape data from Threads, X/Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Dcard, and 104 Job Bank for lead generation, brand monitoring, competitor analysis, influencer discovery, trend research, and more

plugins.name: bycrawl-lead-generation
plugins.description: Generate B2B/B2C leads from LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, and 104 Job Bank using ByCrawl MCP tools

plugins.name: bycrawl-brand-monitoring
plugins.description: Track brand mentions, sentiment, and reputation across Threads, X/Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Xiaohongshu, and Dcard

plugins.name: bycrawl-competitor-intelligence
plugins.description: Analyze competitor social media presence, content strategy, and engagement across LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X/Twitter, and Threads

plugins.name: bycrawl-market-research
plugins.description: Analyze market trends, consumer sentiment, and product validation across Reddit, Xiaohongshu, Dcard, X/Twitter, and other social platforms

plugins.name: bycrawl-influencer-discovery
plugins.description: Find and evaluate influencers for brand partnerships across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Xiaohongshu, and Threads

plugins.name: bycrawl-trend-analysis
plugins.description: Discover trending topics, hashtags, and viral content across TikTok, X/Twitter, Reddit, Instagram, Threads, Dcard, and Xiaohongshu

plugins.name: bycrawl-content-analytics
plugins.description: Track engagement metrics and content performance across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Threads, Facebook, and X/Twitter

plugins.name: bycrawl-audience-analysis
plugins.description: Understand audience demographics, behavior patterns, and engagement quality across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Threads, Reddit, and Facebook
